{{Infobox concept
| name = Virtues
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Elysian]] tests involve testing one's virtues.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Valor is an [[Elysian]] virtue that rewards the caller with [[gold light]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Selflessness is the key to most [[Elysian virtues]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
